endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/devices
endpoints.description: Lists/Searches devices.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/devices
endpoints.description: Creates a device. Only company-owned device may be created. **Note**: This method is available only to customers who have one of the following SKUs: Enterprise Standard, Enterprise Plus, Enterprise for Education, and Cloud Identity Premium
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/groups
endpoints.description: Lists the `Group` resources under a customer or namespace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/groups
endpoints.description: Creates a `Group`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/groups:lookup
endpoints.description: Looks up the [resource name](https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/resource_names) of a `Group` by its `EntityKey`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/groups:search
endpoints.description: Searches for `Group` resources matching a specified query.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/inboundSamlSsoProfiles
endpoints.description: Lists InboundSamlSsoProfiles for a customer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/inboundSamlSsoProfiles
endpoints.description: Creates an InboundSamlSsoProfile for a customer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/inboundSsoAssignments
endpoints.description: Lists the InboundSsoAssignments for a `Customer`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/inboundSsoAssignments
endpoints.description: Creates an InboundSsoAssignment for users and devices in a `Customer` under a given `Group` or `OrgUnit`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets an InboundSsoAssignment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1beta1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes an InboundSsoAssignment. To disable SSO, Create (or Update) an assignment that has `sso_mode` == `SSO_OFF`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1beta1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates an InboundSsoAssignment. The body of this request is the `inbound_sso_assignment` field and the `update_mask` is relative to that. For example: a PATCH to `/v1beta1/inboundSsoAssignments/0abcdefg1234567&update_mask=rank` with a body of `{ "rank": 1 }` moves that (presumably group-targeted) SSO assignment to the highest priority and shifts any other group-targeted assignments down in priority.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:approve
endpoints.description: Approves device to access user data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:block
endpoints.description: Blocks device from accessing user data
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:cancel
endpoints.description: Cancels a UserInvitation that was already sent.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:cancelWipe
endpoints.description: Cancels an unfinished user account wipe. This operation can be used to cancel device wipe in the gap between the wipe operation returning success and the device being wiped.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{name}:isInvitableUser
endpoints.description: Verifies whether a user account is eligible to receive a UserInvitation (is an unmanaged account). Eligibility is based on the following criteria: * the email address is a consumer account and it's the primary email address of the account, and * the domain of the email address matches an existing verified Google Workspace or Cloud Identity domain If both conditions are met, the user is eligible. **Note:** This method is not supported for Workspace Essentials customers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:modifyMembershipRoles
endpoints.description: Modifies the `MembershipRole`s of a `Membership`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:move
endpoints.description: Move an OrgMembership to a new OrgUnit. NOTE: This is an atomic copy-and-delete. The resource will have a new copy under the destination OrgUnit and be deleted from the source OrgUnit. The resource can only be searched under the destination OrgUnit afterwards.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:send
endpoints.description: Sends a UserInvitation to email. If the `UserInvitation` does not exist for this request and it is a valid request, the request creates a `UserInvitation`. **Note:** The `get` and `list` methods have a 48-hour delay where newly-created consumer accounts will not appear in the results. You can still send a `UserInvitation` to those accounts if you know the unmanaged email address and IsInvitableUser==True.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:wipe
endpoints.description: Wipes the user's account on a device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/deviceUsers
endpoints.description: Lists/Searches DeviceUsers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/idpCredentials
endpoints.description: Returns a list of IdpCredentials in an InboundSamlSsoProfile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{parent}/idpCredentials:add
endpoints.description: Adds an IdpCredential. Up to 2 credentials are allowed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/memberships
endpoints.description: List OrgMembership resources in an OrgUnit treated as 'parent'. Parent format: orgUnits/{$orgUnitId} where `$orgUnitId` is the `orgUnitId` from the [Admin SDK `OrgUnit` resource](https://developers.google.com/admin-sdk/directory/reference/rest/v1/orgunits)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{parent}/memberships
endpoints.description: Creates a `Membership`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/memberships:checkTransitiveMembership
endpoints.description: Check a potential member for membership in a group. **Note:** This feature is only available to Google Workspace Enterprise Standard, Enterprise Plus, and Enterprise for Education; and Cloud Identity Premium accounts. A member has membership to a group as long as there is a single viewable transitive membership between the group and the member. The actor must have view permissions to at least one transitive membership between the member and group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/memberships:getMembershipGraph
endpoints.description: Get a membership graph of just a member or both a member and a group. **Note:** This feature is only available to Google Workspace Enterprise Standard, Enterprise Plus, and Enterprise for Education; and Cloud Identity Premium accounts. Given a member, the response will contain all membership paths from the member. Given both a group and a member, the response will contain all membership paths between the group and the member.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/memberships:lookup
endpoints.description: Looks up the [resource name](https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/resource_names) of a `Membership` by its `EntityKey`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/memberships:searchDirectGroups
endpoints.description: Searches direct groups of a member.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/memberships:searchTransitiveGroups
endpoints.description: Search transitive groups of a member. **Note:** This feature is only available to Google Workspace Enterprise Standard, Enterprise Plus, and Enterprise for Education; and Cloud Identity Premium accounts. A transitive group is any group that has a direct or indirect membership to the member. Actor must have view permissions all transitive groups.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/memberships:searchTransitiveMemberships
endpoints.description: Search transitive memberships of a group. **Note:** This feature is only available to Google Workspace Enterprise Standard, Enterprise Plus, and Enterprise for Education; and Cloud Identity Premium accounts. A transitive membership is any direct or indirect membership of a group. Actor must have view permissions to all transitive memberships.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/userinvitations
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of UserInvitation resources. **Note:** New consumer accounts with the customer's verified domain created within the previous 48 hours will not appear in the result. This delay also applies to newly-verified domains.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}:lookup
endpoints.description: Looks up resource names of the DeviceUsers associated with the caller's credentials, as well as the properties provided in the request. This method must be called with end-user credentials with the scope: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-identity.devices.lookup If multiple properties are provided, only DeviceUsers having all of these properties are considered as matches - i.e. the query behaves like an AND. Different platforms require different amounts of information from the caller to ensure that the DeviceUser is uniquely identified. - iOS: No properties need to be passed, the caller's credentials are sufficient to identify the corresponding DeviceUser. - Android: Specifying the 'android_id' field is required. - Desktop: Specifying the 'raw_resource_id' field is required.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
